NAVAREA XIX 139/21
 SVALBARD/GREENLAND SEA/NORWEGIAN SEA
 SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED BY ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER FROM NY-AALESUND,SVALBARD
 IN THE PERIOD 03-17 NOV 2021, BETWEEN 0400-1100 UTC
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS

 DANGER AREA 1 
 A. 78-18.0 N 010-30.0 E
 B. 78-57.0 N 012-10.0 E
 C. 79-00.0 N 011-45.0 E
 D. 78-19.0 N 010-20.0 E

 DANGER AREA 2

 B. 77-40.0 N 011-40.0 E
 C. 78-12.0 N 007-10.0 E
 D. 76-50.0 N 004-50.0 E

 DANGER AREA 3

 B. 71-00.0 N 001-30.0 E
 C. 71-26.0 N 004-05.0 W
 D. 67-52.0 N 008-45.0 W
